fridge: Check the wall, benchtop and overhead cabinet as separate measurements before delivery day.
Leave enough room to level the cabinet after it is in position, not just enough room to slide it in.
Keep the installation manual beside the tape measure so the airflow note is checked against the real cavity.
washing_machine: Measure with the water taps and waste hose in mind, not just the cabinet box.
Leave room for the hoses to curve naturally so the machine can sit square once it is levelled.
If the laundry door swings inward, measure that arc before the machine is delivered.
dishwasher: Measure the cavity after the floor finish and kickboard are installed, not before.
Check the service void and hose route at the rear before you commit to the cabinet depth.
Level the dishwasher with the door open once the side gaps are confirmed.
dryer: Check the wall gap and lint service access before the dryer is pushed fully home.
If the dryer is stacked, measure from the finished floor to the underside of the shelf or cupboard above.
Confirm the venting plan before delivery if the model is not condenser or heat-pump.

samsung_fridge: Samsung fridge installs are often limited by the top gap, so measure to the underside of the cabinet door and not the cabinet box alone.
If the opening is tight, check the hinge cover height before you compare cabinet heights.
Leave space to level the front feet after the cabinet is in place.
lg_fridge: LG fridge installs usually reward a careful rear-wall check, especially where the powerpoint or tap projects forward.
Measure the handle line and the skirting line separately if the opening narrows near the front.
Keep a little working room at the front so the cabinet can be levelled cleanly.
fisher-paykel_fridge: Measure the finished joinery opening rather than the cabinet drawing if the kitchen is already installed.
Check the rear service point early so you know whether the cabinet can sit square against the wall line.
If the overhead doors sit low, measure to the moving edge of the door rather than the fixed carcass.
